source_of_truth: feature_list.json is the executable feature tracker. PLAN.md holds Stage deep specs. openspec/changes/<topic>/ holds in-progress and recently-approved spec changes (those with pending implementation). openspec/changes/archive/<topic>/ holds completed/archived spec changes (implementation done, retained for historical reference). See AGENTS.md §8 for relationship.

active_changes.status: done (approved by user, implementation pending stage-12)

stages.name: Tauri 2 脚手架 + SQLite 数据层 (schema v3)

stages.name: Provider 模型 + 5 adapter + CRUD
stages.description: provider/{mod,adapter,openai,deepseek,anthropic,github,postgres}.rs + services/{provider,category}.rs + commands/provider.rs。5 个 preset adapter(每 preset 30-50 行): OpenAI (test: GET /v1/models, quota: subscription+usage 3-month), DeepSeek (test + quota: GET /user/balance), Anthropic (test: POST /v1/messages max_tokens=1, quota: Unsupported), GitHub (no test, quota: GET /rate_limit), PostgreSQL (no test, quota: pg_database_size,需 tokio-postgres)。test_connection 仅 3 LLM 启用,GitHub/Postgres can_test=false。validate_key 错误三态(InvalidKey/Ambiguous/Network)。ProviderField CRUD 含 visibility 切换。Category CRUD 含 default 不可删 + 删除时强制迁移 provider。**12 IPC 命令**(rev 2 修正:list_providers/get/add/update/delete + list_categories/add/delete + test_connection + fetch_quota + get/set_theme)。**adapter_for returns Option**(rev 2 修正:不再 panic,unknown/Custom 返回 None 触发 ProviderCannotTest/ProviderQuotaUnsupported)。Async runtime: HTTP 走 tauri::async_runtime::spawn,SQLite 走 spawn_blocking。

stages.description: Schema v3→v4 migration adding 3 tables (token_usage_records, daily_agent_model_usage, daily_model_usage) + PricingService with 50-model pricing.json + error variants. Direct integration tests (no IPC).
stages.evidence:
cargo check: PASS
cargo test: 6/6 PASS (3 pricing + 1 rollup + 1 insert+query+rollup)
Bug fix: query_map parameter order [limit, offset] not [offset, limit]
Hard constraints: visibility TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'visible': PASS; value TEXT: PASS; preset TEXT: PASS; category_id INTEGER NOT NULL: PASS; encryption crates: PASS (empty); fs::write: PASS (create_dir_all for %APPDATA% only, whitelisted)
stages.notes: Tests rewritten from broken Tauri IPC e2e to direct DB/service integration tests. Bug: query_map([offset, limit]) passed params in wrong order — SQL LIMIT got 0. Fixed to [limit, offset]. Removed debug eprintln! statements after fix.

stages.name: TokenUsageService — pure Rust business layer
stages.description: services/token_usage.rs — TokenUsageService holding Arc<Mutex<Database>> + Arc<PricingService>. 6 sync methods: record_usage / list_records / get_summary / import_jsonl / import_csv / refresh_daily_rollups. 8 DTOs in types.rs (UsageRecordInput / UsageFilter / UsageSummary / UsageSummaryAgentPair / DailySeries / ImportResult / ImportError / TokenUsageCostBreakdown). Fixed Stage A INSERT bug (prompt_tokens/completion_tokens columns now read from TokenUsageRecord fields). A1 fix: per-dimension cost split (input/output/cache_read/cache_creation/reasoning) computed in PricingService.calculate_token_usage_cost → TokenUsageCostBreakdown, stored in TokenUsageRecord per-dim cost fields + cost_details JSON. 4 new DB methods: list_token_usage_records_filtered, count_token_usage_records_filtered, get_token_usage_record_by_id, delete_daily_for_date. JSONL dual-format parser (Claude + Codex). CSV with quoted-field handling. FNV-1a 64-bit hex for deterministic import dedup id. 15 unit tests inlined.
stages.evidence:
cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --lib: PASS
cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --lib: 20/20 PASS (15 token_usage + 5 adapter)
  - record_usage_happy_path: PASS
  - record_usage_duplicate: PASS
  - cost_calculation_known_model: PASS (gpt-4o 1M+1M = $12.50; per-dim: prompt=2.50, completion=10.00, cache_read=0, cache_creation=0, reasoning=0; cost_details JSON has all 5 fields)
  - cost_calculation_unknown_model: PASS (all 5 dims = 0; cost_details has pricing_missing_for)
  - cost_calculation_with_cache_read: PASS (gpt-4o 1M cache_read = $1.25)
  - cost_calculation_with_cache_creation: PASS (gpt-4o 1M cache_creation = $2.50)
  - list_records_filtered_by_date: PASS
  - list_records_filtered_by_agent: PASS
  - get_summary_aggregates_correctly: PASS (rollup sync via database.rs::insert_token_usage tx.commit + INSERT OR REPLACE COALESCE upsert)
  - import_jsonl_claude_format: PASS
  - import_jsonl_codex_format: PASS
  - import_jsonl_dedup: PASS (imported=1, skipped=1)
  - import_csv_basic: PASS
  - import_csv_bad_header: PASS (TokenUsageInvalidFormat)
  - refresh_daily_rollups_recomputes: PASS (ops tool for corruption recovery, not hot-path)
Hard constraints:
  - grep 'use tauri' services/token_usage.rs: 0 matches
  - grep 'tx.commit' services/token_usage.rs: 1 match (refresh_daily_rollups); database.rs: 2 matches (insert_token_usage + refresh)
  - All fallible fns return Result<T, AppError>
  - No fs::write in services/
A1 fix: TokenUsageCostBreakdown struct in types.rs; PricingService.calculate_token_usage_cost now returns Result<TokenUsageCostBreakdown, AppError> with per-dim costs (input/output/cache_read/cache_creation/reasoning) and pricing_missing_for flag. record_usage stores all 5 cost fields on TokenUsageRecord and emits full breakdown in cost_details JSON (currency + 5 dims + total + optional pricing_missing_for).
stages.notes: Methods are sync (not async) — rusqlite + std::sync::Mutex are blocking. Tauri IPC layer (Stage C) wraps with spawn_blocking if needed. No Cargo.toml changes — FNV-1a hash inlined to avoid sha2 dep. Stage A INSERT bug fixed in this stage: added prompt_tokens/completion_tokens fields to TokenUsageRecord, updated both INSERT params and list_token_usage_records SELECT to read correct columns. Rollup sync (PLAN §3.1) lives at the DB layer in insert_token_usage (tx.commit + INSERT OR REPLACE COALESCE), not in the service record_usage — service just delegates. refresh_daily_rollups is a belt-and-suspenders ops tool for corruption recovery / future nightly sweep. record_usage signature is record_usage(id: &str, input: UsageRecordInput) — A2: extra id param is deliberate so imports (deterministic_id on 5-tuple) feed the same id to record_usage → unique constraint fires → TokenUsageDuplicate → counted as skipped. Plan §3.1 signature mismatch resolved in favor of Stage C IPC contract clarity.

stages.name: Token Usage IPC layer (5 handlers)
stages.description: commands/token_usage.rs — 5 Tauri IPC handlers bridging frontend API contract to Stage B service layer. Handlers: record_usage / list_usage_records / get_usage_summary / import_usage / get_pricing. IPC DTOs mirror webui/src/types/api.ts. Conversion layer handles ISO<->epoch, provider->provider_name, usage_details JSON serialization, and PricingEntry per-1M->per-token conversion. Added provider field to UsageSummaryAgentPair + updated get_summary SQL GROUP BY. Added PricingService::all_entries().

stages.name: Action Registry — Agent 可发现/可调用操作层
stages.description: 在现有 commands/ + services/ 之上新增 actions/ 层，将 12+ 个操作注册为带 schema 的可发现单元。新增 2 个 IPC：list_actions / execute_action，供外部 Agent/MCP 通过 invoke 调用。保留现有 12 个强类型 IPC 不变。
stages.evidence:
cargo check: PASS
cargo test --lib: 22/22 PASS
cargo test --test ipc_e2e: 30/30 PASS (includes 11 new action registry tests: list_actions_returns_all_registered, execute_action_category_list, execute_action_provider_list, execute_action_unknown_returns_error, execute_action_unknown_returns_action_not_found, execute_action_missing_required_field_returns_error, execute_action_wrong_field_type_returns_error, execute_action_non_object_params_returns_error, execute_action_token_usage_pricing, execute_action_token_usage_record, dispatch_consistency_with_all_actions)
pnpm tsc --noEmit: PASS
pnpm build: PASS (357.18 KB JS + 22.87 KB CSS)
Hard constraints: visibility TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'visible' PASS; value TEXT PASS; preset TEXT PASS; category_id INTEGER NOT NULL PASS; no encryption crates PASS; no fs::write PASS
Oracle review: ACCEPT WITH CHANGES — all 5 actionable issues (high+medium) fixed (flat schema, ActionValidation/ActionNotFound error variants, params pre-check, coverage doc)
stages.notes: 实现路径：(1) 给所有 services/ + commands/ 加 *_by_state(&AppState) helper，原 tauri::State 版本 delegate，避免双重实现。(2) actions/ 5 个 domain module + 1 个 mod.rs central dispatch，用 serde_json::Value 动态传参，serde_json::from_value 反序列化成 typed request。(3) commands/action.rs 2 个 IPC: list_actions / execute_action。(4) 前端 mirror action-registry.ts + useActions.ts hook（useActionList / useExecuteAction / useAction lookup）。18 actions total: 6 provider + 3 category + 1 quota + 3 system + 5 token_usage。execute_action 极简校验：只检查 required field 存在 + 类型 + 非 object params，schema 完整校验留 V0.2。新增 AppError::ActionValidation / ActionNotFound 变体 + 对应 IPC 错误码 ACTION_VALIDATION / ACTION_NOT_FOUND，前端 types/api.ts 同步更新。Coverage note 注释记录 3 个有意不暴露的 typed IPC（tray.pin/unpin + quota.set_manual）。Deepwork progress: .slim/deepwork/stage-10-action-registry.md。

stages.notes: 设计决策:(1) search 单一 owner = CategorySidebar,ProviderList 维持 dumb component;(2) field.value 不参与匹配 = 防 secret 误暴露;(3) 不引防抖 / 正则 / FTS5,includes 足够;(4) Icon.tsx 加 search 是因为现有 iconMap 不含,plan 阶段没 grep 核验。V0.3 计划: 用量历史曲线 + test_connection UI 增强。

stages.name: UI Redesign: Kaku 设计系统应用
stages.description: 把 Kaku 设计系统 (openspec/changes/ui-redesign/) 应用到 webui。Token 替换 (globals.css + tailwind.config.ts 切 Kaku 色板/字阶/间距/圆角,**含 tailwind.config.ts:4 darkMode 迁移 + ThemeToggle.tsx:17-28 data-theme 迁移 — H-3**)+ 布局重做 (删 CategorySidebar + ProviderList,改 ProviderCard + ProviderGrid + DensityToggle)+ Detail 改 Modal (**ProviderDetailModal 重用 Modal.tsx 原地改造,不再创建 ModalShell — H-1**)+ shadcn ui 组件 (button/card/input/select/toast) 全圆角 + 无 shadow。Charter 字体走 Google Fonts,加 link 标签。3 主题 (Auto/Light/Dark) 行为保留,dark 变体 coherent inversion (warm near-black #1a1916 + lightened navy #7da3d1)。Drag handle 留 affordance 不接 dnd 库。零新 IPC / 零新 schema / 零新后端 / 零 emoji。8 子任务 T-UI-001..008,@fixer 按 tasks.md 跑。T-UI-003 / T-UI-004 / T-UI-005 三者 squash 成单个 stage-12 commit 同时落地 (H-2)。

stage-12 implementation committed (cfd21ac + 788f9bb).
UI files: 35 files changed (+2574/-781 lines).
pnpm tsc --noEmit: PASS (0 errors)
pnpm build: PASS (3.76s, 355.67 KB JS gzipped 112 KB + 22.33 KB CSS)
cargo check: PASS (1m 02s)
cargo test --lib: 5/5 PASS
vitest m10-usage-hooks: 6/7 PASS (1 v5 mutation data design issue, invoke assertion passes)
M8 grep gates (G1-G8): all PASS after em-dash cleanup (44 em-dashes replaced with '--')
M8 build gates (B1-B3): all PASS
AD1 (no .skip/.todo/unimplemented): PASS
AD2 (cargo test lie): PASS (test ran, 5 passed)
AD3 (SQL tx unscoped): N/A (no Rust changes in this stage)
Viewport (V1-V3) + Behavior (BH1-BH5) gates: deferred to human visual verification
stages.notes: 用户已批准设计 (webui/dist/design-preview.html v2 + openspec/changes/ui-redesign/)。8 任务 T-UI-001..008。**关键决策**：(1) Charter 字体 Google Fonts + system fallback (Charter→Georgia→Palatino→Times New Roman);(2) Density toggle 状态 localStorage `keypilot.density` 持久化,默认 '1';(3) Modal 沿用 Radix Dialog (focus trap / Esc / overlay click 行为现成);(4) Drag handle 仅 affordance,本期不接 dnd 库,后续 V0.X 接 @dnd-kit;(5) 删 CategorySidebar + ProviderList + ProviderDetail 三个旧组件,新组件为 ProviderCard + ProviderGrid + ProviderDetailModal;(6) Auto 主题 = matchMedia resolver,无独立 data-theme='auto' 规则;(7) ProviderCard 接受 onClick + onRefresh(分离刷新与打开,避免事件冒泡)。V0.3 token-usage-history 沿用本 stage 的设计系统。**实测 build 体积**: 355.67 KB JS (gzipped 112 KB) + 22.33 KB CSS — 比 wave 0 +20KB JS (估算范围高,因多 swipper 组件),CSS 略增 3 KB。**Stage-12 审查补丁 (2026-06-25)**:H-1..H-5 + M-1..M-16 + L-1..L-6/L-8 已合并入 execution-plan.md / design.md / tasks.md,详见 openspec/changes/ui-redesign/execution-plan.md §3 / §6 / §7 / §10 / §11 / §13。L-7 (spec.md REQ-UI-004.4 localStorage vs DB 漂移) 不在 stage-12 scope,开独立 spec amendment PR。**Wave 拆分实施 (2026-06-26, commit cfd21ac + 788f9bb)**:Wave 0 (M1/M2/M9 foundation) 在 788f9bb;Wave 1-4 (M3+M5+M10+M4+M6+M11a-c+M12a-b+M7+M13+M8) 在 cfd21ac。lanes/worktree 隔离:worktree ui-update 基于 main 3094e54。

stages.name: V0.1.1 入口补全 + ProviderDetailModal 修复
stages.description: Stage 12 (UI redesign) 删了 CategorySidebar + ProviderList + ProviderDetail 但未补回 新建凭证 / 新建分类 / 添加字段 三个入口。ProviderDetailModal 也有 `if (!providerId) return null` + `open={true}` 写死,导致内部 state 在不同 provider 之间泄漏。本 stage 把所有入口补回 + 修 modal 状态泄漏 + 修 handleTest/handleFetchQuota 之前是 console.log stub,接到 Tauri IPC。
stages.evidence:
pnpm tsc --noEmit: PASS (0 errors)
pnpm build: PASS (357 KB JS + 22 KB CSS, 4.05s)
cargo test --lib: 22/22 PASS
cargo test --test ipc_e2e: 30/30 PASS (无 Rust 改动)
Hard constraints: 全部沿用 Stage 12 (无新约束破坏)
Oracle review: ACCEPT WITH CHANGES — 2 bug 修 (cache invalidation 改用 updateMutation.mutateAsync; revealedFields 在 add 后 reset), 1 defensive 建议留作 V0.1.2
stages.notes:
实施路径：(1) ProviderDetailModal 加 addKvOpen state + handleAddKv (走 updateMutation.mutateAsync 让 cache 失效) + ' + 添加字段' 按钮 + AddKvModal 渲染。修 'if (!providerId) return null' 注释说明状态泄漏问题。(2) TopBar 加 onAddClick prop,右端用 ml-auto 渲染 '+ 添加凭证' 按钮。(3) ProviderGrid 加 onAddClick prop,空态显示 CTA。(4) SettingsModal 加 Categories 区块(列表 + 添加输入 + 删除带 migrate-to 下拉 + ConfirmDialog 复用)。(5) App.tsx 加 addCredOpen state,接 AddCredentialModal 渲染,把 handleTest/handleFetchQuota 从 console.log stub 改为真 invoke testConnection / fetchQuota + queryClient.invalidateQueries。

Oracle 修：(B1) handleAddKv 改用 updateMutation.mutateAsync — 之前直接调 updateProvider 跳过 onSuccess 失效,导致 add 后 modal 看不到新 field。(B2) 成功后 setRevealedFields(new Set()) — Rust updateProvider 是 REPLACE-ALL 重新 INSERT,所有 field.id 变,旧 revealed IDs 全失效。

已知 pre-existing 限制(out of scope):P1 (last_tested 字段在 Provider struct/TS type 不存在 → Status pill 永远 'Not tested'),P2 (Provider 无 quota 字段 → Detail modal quota section 永远 'No quota data')。这两个是 Stage 12 遗留 stub,V0.1.2 + Rust backend 修。

新增 IPC:无。Schema:无变更。仅 UI wiring + React state 补全。
